sentences.arabic: طَبَخَ الْأَبُ الدَّجَاجَ عَلَى الشَّوَّايَةِ فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Otac je pekao piletinu na roštilju u dvorištu.
sentences.translationEn: The father grilled chicken on the barbecue in the garden.
The smell of the chicken filled the place.

sentences.translation: Komšije su došle i sjele sa porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: The neighbors came and sat with the family.

sentences.translation: Jeli su zajedno, smijali se i uživali u vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: They ate together, laughed, and enjoyed the time.
